Postgres.ResolveChampionshipByMatchIdQuery: SELECT championshipid FROM matches WHERE id = @matchId
Postgres.BuildStandingsJsonQuery: SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(row_to_json(t)), '[]'::json)::text FROM ( SELECT c.championshipid AS "championshipId", c.teamid AS "teamId", c.position, c.points, tm.name, tm.emblem FROM classifications c JOIN teams tm ON tm.id = c.teamid WHERE c.championshipid = @championshipId ORDER BY c.position ) t
Postgres.BuildCardsJsonQuery: SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(json_build_object('yellowCards', ds.YellowCards, 'redCards', ds.RedCards, 'name', ds.Name, 'picture', ds.Picture, 'teamEmblem', ds.TeamEmblem, 'teamId', ds.TeamId, 'id', ds.ID) ORDER BY ds.YellowCards DESC, ds.RedCards DESC)::text, '[]') FROM (SELECT ts.YellowCards, ts.RedCards, COALESCE(u.Name, pt.Name) AS Name, COALESCE(u.Picture, pt.Picture) AS Picture, t.Emblem AS TeamEmblem, t.Id AS TeamId, ts.PlayerIdOrTempId AS ID FROM (SELECT COALESCE(f.PlayerId, f.PlayerTempId) AS PlayerIdOrTempId, CAST(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE f.YellowCard) AS INTEGER) AS YellowCards, CAST(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE NOT f.YellowCard) AS INTEGER) AS RedCards FROM fouls f JOIN matches m ON m.Id = f.MatchId WHERE m.ChampionshipId = @championshipId AND f.Valid = true GROUP BY COALESCE(f.PlayerId, f.PlayerTempId) ORDER BY YellowCards DESC, RedCards DESC LIMIT 15) ts LEFT JOIN users u ON u.Id = ts.PlayerIdOrTempId LEFT JOIN playertempprofiles pt ON pt.Id = ts.PlayerIdOrTempId LEFT JOIN teams t ON t.Id = COALESCE(u.PlayerTeamId, pt.TeamsId)) ds;
Postgres.BuildStrikersJsonQuery: SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(json_build_object('goals', ds.Goals, 'name', ds.Name, 'picture', ds.Picture, 'teamEmblem', ds.TeamEmblem, 'teamId', ds.TeamId, 'id', ds.ID) ORDER BY ds.Goals DESC)::text, '[]') FROM (SELECT ts.Goals, COALESCE(u.Name, pt.Name) AS Name, COALESCE(u.Picture, pt.Picture) AS Picture, t.Emblem AS TeamEmblem, t.Id AS TeamId, ts.PlayerIdOrTempId AS ID FROM (SELECT COALESCE(g.PlayerId, g.PlayerTempId) AS PlayerIdOrTempId, CAST(COUNT(*) AS INTEGER) AS Goals FROM goals g JOIN matches m ON g.MatchId = m.Id WHERE g.OwnGoal = false AND m.ChampionshipId = @championshipId GROUP BY COALESCE(g.PlayerId, g.PlayerTempId) ORDER BY Goals DESC LIMIT 15) ts LEFT JOIN users u ON u.Id = ts.PlayerIdOrTempId LEFT JOIN playertempprofiles pt ON pt.Id = ts.PlayerIdOrTempId LEFT JOIN teams t ON t.Id = COALESCE(u.PlayerTeamId, pt.TeamsId)) ds;
